description:
Validate that pharmacy fulfillment can be handled through MDI e-prescribe/passthrough workflows for launch.

**Scope**
- Trace a test approved case through MDI to the pharmacy partner path where possible.
- Confirm which status events Apoth can show to patients and which remain in MDI/support workflows.
- Document operational fallback for fulfillment questions at launch.

**Acceptance**
- Launch team knows exactly what fulfillment status can appear in the dashboard.
- No direct pharmacy API work is required for v1.
- Any gap becomes a future ticket with a named business need.
title: Validate pharmacy fulfillment via MDI passthrough
